channel.title: Mirror on Margrop Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Mirror on Margrop Blog

item.title: Using Cloudflare to Build gh-proxy for GitHub Acceleration
item.description:
In previous episodes, I’ve experimented with Qinglong Panel. However, when trying to pull GitHub repositories, you may encounter network issues leading to pull failures. Regular GitHub file downloads are also extremely slow. So I used the free Cloudflare to build gh-proxy for GitHub acceleration.

I. Prerequisites

You need to prepare a Cloudflare account and a domain name (optional) in advance. For free domains, you can refer to the previous article ‘免费申请注册eu.org二级域名’

item.title: How to Configure a Freshly Installed Ubuntu 20.04 Server VM on PVE
item.description:
Download the Installation ISO

Aliyun Ubuntu 20.04 live server download Aliyun Ubuntu 18.04 live server download

item.title: Initialization script after Proxmox VE installation
item.description: In order to facilitate the installation of PVE, I compiled the relevant commands myself. Please modify them according to your own environment.
